title: French Kiss
description: Get your lips ready to pucker up this Valentine's Day with our absinthe-flavoured lip scrub. Mon cheri, how smooth your lips are!
ingredients: Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil (Organic Jojoba Oil)
Citrus Sinensis Peel Oil Expressed (Organic Sweet Orange Oil)

images.alt: French Kiss. A neatly smudged swatch of thick, textured, bright lime-green lip scrub with visible sugar granules.
A small, clear glass jar of Lush "French Kiss" lip scrub sits on a pink podium. The lime-green scrub is shown with its black lid resting nearby against a pink curtain with a heart-shaped spotlight.

A woman in pink strawberry pyjamas lies on a bed, smiling as she holds an open jar of green "French Kiss" lip scrub. She holds the black lid in her other hand while reclining on a red and green patterned bedspread.

A woman in pink strawberry pyjamas holds an open jar of green "French Kiss" lip scrub while reclining on a bed. She smiles as she prepares to apply the product with her finger in a cosy, candlelit bedroom setting.
A close-up image shows the grainy, sparkling texture of Lush "French Kiss" lip scrub. A person with dark skin uses a finger to apply the bright green, sugary paste to their lips.

A woman in pink strawberry pyjamas laughs while applying green "French Kiss" lip scrub to her bottom lip. She holds the open jar in her other hand while reclining in a warm, dimly lit room with red curtains.
A close-up image showing the thick, grainy texture of Lush "French Kiss" lip scrub. The vibrant green scrub is spread in diagonal, overlapping ridges, highlighting its sugary consistency.
